description: Determines the properties of the creature's immunity. Roll once on this table for type. After rolling, determine commonality: 1-33 common (blunt assault, non-magical weapons), 34-67 uncommon (poison, arrows), 68-100 rare (vacuum of space, specific magical sword).

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the properties of the creature's immunity. Roll once on this table for type. After rolling, determine commonality: 1-33 common (blunt assault, non-magical weapons), 34-67 uncommon (poison, arrows), 68-100 rare (vacuum of space, specific magical sword).

entries.description: The immunity is against an attack form, not from an effect.

descriptionTranslations.en: The immunity is against an attack form, not from an effect.

entries.description: The immunity is against an effect, and not a damaging attack. For instance, maybe the creature is immune to any effects that force it to sleep.

descriptionTranslations.en: The immunity is against an effect, and not a damaging attack. For instance, maybe the creature is immune to any effects that force it to sleep.
